spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

hero.layout: Relative full-width container, min-h-[80vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center
hero.background: Absolute inset-0, overflow-hidden. Use a CSS grid of blurred images (mosaic) with `scale-110` and mouse-parallax movement via framer-motion. Overlay with `bg-[#05050A]/70 backdrop-blur-md` to ensure text contrast.
hero.badge: Pill-shaped badge 'Free assets for video editors', `bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm mb-6`
hero.title: Sentence case 'Level up your edits'. 'edits' must be wrapped in a span with `text-[#00F0FF]` and a subtle `drop-shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)]`. Use framer-motion for bouncy entrance `type: 'spring', bounce: 0.6`.
hero.search_bar: Centered massive search bar, `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl h-16 w-full max-w-2xl px-6 text-lg focus:border-[#00F0FF]/50 transition-all`

navigation.layout: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4
navigation.surface: Crystal glass variant: `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#05050A]/70 border-b border-white/10 shadow-[0_4px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]`
navigation.tabs: Center aligned tabs. Inactive `text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors`, active `text-white bg-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5`
navigation.actions: 'Access Upload' button with lock icon (ghost style). 'Discord' button (solid fill `bg-[#5865F2] hover:bg-[#4752C4] text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all`)

asset_card.surface: Glassmorphism: `bg-[#0D0D14]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden`
asset_card.interactions: On hover: `scale-[1.03]` (not too extreme), `border-white/20`, image slightly zooms `scale-105`. 3D tilt effect via `react-tilt` component with `max: 15, scale: 1.03, speed: 400`.

audio_player.surface: Sticky bottom bar or inline card player.
audio_player.elements: Play/Pause button (`bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-400 text-black rounded-full p-3 transition-colors`), custom waveform visualization (use abstract waveform image or HTML5 canvas), volume slider (`accent-emerald-500`), download counter.

motion.parallax_panning: Use `framer-motion` `useScroll` or `usePointer` to shift hero background by -20px to 20px based on mouse position.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main marketing/hero layouts to allow absolute freedom with the mosaic background and overlapping elements.
Use framer-motion for the 'Level up your edits' title entrance. Split the text into characters or words and stagger them with the provided cubic-bezier bounce.
Implement the 3D tilt effect on the asset cards using `react-tilt` or `framer-motion` to give them a premium physical feel.
Ensure the hero background mosaic images are significantly blurred (`blur-xl` or similar) so they create a colorful texture rather than distracting from the search and title.
Ensure Discord CTA button uses the official Discord color (#5865F2) as requested.
Use .js/.jsx extensions for all React components, NOT .tsx.
The audio player needs a custom aesthetic avoiding native <audio> controls. Build a sleek UI using a slider and play/pause button.
All navigation, forms, and cards must strictly adhere to the `data-testid` convention (e.g. `data-testid='hero-search-input'`).
